fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item for which the prepayment percentage is valid.

fields.name: Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor that the prepayment percentage for this item is valid for.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date from which the purchase prepayment percentage is valid.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date to which the purchase prepayment percentage is valid.

fields.name: Prepayment %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the prepayment percentage to use to calculate the prepayment for purchases.
